system.description: Until the start of your next turn, you manifest your accumulated absorption fully. All attack cards deal +RESONANCE bonus damage. All enemies within 20 meters take 5 + RESONANCE damage at the start of each of their turns. You are immune to all debuffs during this state — every attempt to apply a status to you adds 2 Loaded instead. Allies within 20 meters are cleansed of 1 debuff at the start of each of their turns. You do not stop. You have not stopped for years.
